title: Spotify-controls
description: Control your Spotify playback directly from Minecraft using simple commands!
body:
# 🎵 Spotify Controls Mod for Minecraft 1.21+ Control your Spotify playback directly from Minecraft using simple commands! # ✨ Features - 🎵 Full Playback Control – Play, pause, skip, previous track - 🔊 Volume Control – Set volume from 0–100% - 🔁 Loop Modes – Track, context, or off - 📢 Now Playing Toasts – Automatic notifications when songs change - 📊 Music Progress Bar – XP bar syncs with the music progress - 🔐 Secure Authentication – OAuth2 login flow - 💾 Persistent Storage – Tokens saved locally ### Note:- You need to be registered at https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard Also,this mod requires Spotify Premium for playback controls because the Spotify Web API only allows controlling playback for Premium accounts. You can still use this mod without Premium to: - View the currently playing track - See the music progress bar in the XP bar ## 📦 Requirements - Minecraft 1.21+ - Fabric Loader 0.16.5+ - Fabric API 0.100.8+ - Java 21+ - Spotify Premium account (required for playback control API) ## ⌨️ Commands
Click to expand ### 🔐 Authentication - /spotify login - Opens browser for Spotify login - /spotify logout - Logs out and clears tokens - /spotify status - Check connection status ### ▶️ Playback Control - /spotify resume - Resume playback - /spotify pause - Pause playback - /spotify skip - Skip to next track - /spotify previous - Go to previous track - /spotify current - Show currently playing track - /spotify play - Search and play a song ### ⚙️ Settings - /spotify volume <0-100> - Set volume (e.g., /spotify volume 50) - /spotify loop - Set repeat mode ### 🔁 Loop modes: - /spotify loop track – Repeat current track - /spotify loop context – Repeat playlist / album - /spotify loop off – No repeat
▶️ Usage Example - First-time setup -> /spotify login - Your browser will open (or a link will appear in chat), log in to Spotify ## 🛠️ Troubleshooting
Click to expand - ❌ "Not logged in" error Run /spotify login and complete authentication - ❌ "Failed to play / pause" Make sure Spotify is open on at least one device Verify you have Spotify Premium Run /spotify status to check connection - 🔔 Toast notifications not appearing Ensure Spotify is actively playing music Confirm the mod is loaded (/spotify status) - 🔄 Token expired Tokens refresh automatically If needed, run: /spotify logout /spotify login - 🌐 Browser doesn’t open Manually open the URL shown in chat or logs
## 🔐 Privacy & Security - Tokens are stored locally in your Minecraft config folder, no data is sent anywhere except Spotify’s official API. - Tokens can be removed anytime using -> /spotify logout
